concept: A monochromatic, single geometric motif that represents a fragmented, dissolving silhouette trapped within the shape of a water droplet.
medium: Pure black-and-white vector art with crisp, hard edges and a flat graphic quality.

concept: A specific, changing symbolic motif for each chapter, focusing on surreal anatomical distortions merging with Vietnamese architectural elements.
medium: Stipple and ink wash, utilizing a full-color watercolor palette with damp, bleeding edges.

concept: A single, continuous, monochrome line drawing that forms a raindrop containing the fragmentary outline of a mundane object fading into nothingness.
medium: Single-line ink stroke with dry brush texture, pure black ink on white.

concept: A highly detailed, fixed vignette combining photorealistic Vietnamese urban textures with grotesque, melting anatomy in a classical format.
medium: Vintage woodcut printmaking style using cross-hatching, pure monochrome with no grayscale.
